reviews.comment:
Edificación tradicional ACA, según quien sea el playero es la atención, el ofrecimiento de limpiar parabrisas y luneta es para vehículos 2018 en adelante,( si tu autito es más viejito, arreglàtelas solito,) aunque siempre llenaba el tanque de gasoil , dos veces solamente recibí ese servicio...

(Translated by Google)
Traditional ACA building; the service depends on who the attendant is. The windshield and rear window cleaning service is only offered for vehicles 2018 and newer (if your car is older, you're on your own). Although I always filled my diesel tank, I only received that service twice...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aTlYb2ZnEAE
